headline: Why Capital One Financial (COF) is One of the Top Cheap Blue Chip Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the top cheap blue chip stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. UBS lifted the price target on Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) to $275 from $270 on July 7 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The stock also received a rating update from […]
